info.name: Encounter Service GraphQL API
info.description: A collection of GraphQL requests for the Encounter Service, which provides a GraphQL API for managing FHIR Encounter resources.

request.description: Get a specific encounter by ID.
Get encounters for a specific patient.
Create a new hospital inpatient stay.
Create a new emergency department visit.
Create a new outpatient clinic appointment.
Create a new home health visit.
